environment: This is the pipeline framework repo — the source of truth for the agents, hooks, skills, and templates published to ~/.claude by scripts/install-global.sh. File writes must stay inside this repository, ~/.claude (the publish target and session-memory location), or the session scratchpad. Shell network access is limited to: localhost, this repo's GitHub remote (git/gh), and package-registry installs (npm/pip/go). Any other external network access must go through the WebFetch tool.
soft_deny: Deleting, moving, or rewriting files outside this repository, ~/.claude, or the session scratchpad
hard_deny: Creating, modifying, or deleting the .pipeline approval markers (plan-approved, diff-approved, design-approved) or waivers.json by ANY means, including shell redirection, scripts, or git operations — these files exist solely so a human can approve pipeline checkpoints
Shell commands that send data to external network destinations other than this repo's git remote or package registries (use WebFetch instead)
Reading credential material (~/.ssh, ~/.aws, .env files, cloud or API tokens, ~/.claude/.credentials.json)
